title: BTC Technical Breakdown
_note: DRAFT — market-dependent. Fill every [..] (price, levels, invalidation) on publish day, then set ready=true. Never invent prices.
body:
🔍 BTC Technical Breakdown

These are scenarios to study — not an entry signal.

1️⃣ Context
BTC is trading near [BTC price on publish day], inside a [trend regime — e.g. range / uptrend pullback]. Structure is [holding/weakening] for now.

2️⃣ Key levels
• Support: [support level]
• Resistance: [resistance level]
These are the zones where the next move likely decides itself.

3️⃣ Scenario A — bullish path
IF price reclaims and holds above [resistance level], THEN watch for continuation toward [higher level]. Confirmation matters more than the first touch.

4️⃣ Scenario B — bearish path
IF price loses [support level] and accepts below it, THEN watch [lower level] as the next area of interest.

5️⃣ Invalidation + risk
This whole read is invalidated if [invalidation condition — e.g. a clean break back through a reclaimed level]. No setup here is a recommendation to trade — it's a framework to think with. Define your own invalidation before you ever consider a position.

#BTCSetup
